1→package transflow
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"fmt"
     6→	"testing"
     7→	"time"
     8→
     9→	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
    10→	"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock"
    11→)
    12→
    13→// Mock KB Storage for testing
    14→type MockKBStorage struct {
    15→	mock.Mock
    16→}
    17→
    18→func (m *MockKBStorage) WriteCase(ctx context.Context, lang, signature, runID string, caseData *CaseRecord) error {
    19→	args := m.Called(ctx, lang, signature, runID, caseData)
    20→	return args.Error(0)
    21→}
    22→
    23→func (m *MockKBStorage) ReadCases(ctx context.Context, lang, signature string) ([]*CaseRecord, error) {
    24→	args := m.Called(ctx, lang, signature)
    25→	if args.Get(0) == nil {
    26→		return nil, args.Error(1)
    27→	}
    28→	return args.Get(0).([]*CaseRecord), args.Error(1)
    29→}
    30→
    31→func (m *MockKBStorage) ReadSummary(ctx context.Context, lang, signature string) (*SummaryRecord, error) {
    32→	args := m.Called(ctx, lang, signature)
    33→	if args.Get(0) == nil {
    34→		return nil, args.Error(1)
    35→	}
    36→	return args.Get(0).(*SummaryRecord), args.Error(1)
    37→}
    38→
    39→func (m *MockKBStorage) WriteSummary(ctx context.Context, lang, signature string, summary *SummaryRecord) error {
    40→	args := m.Called(ctx, lang, signature, summary)
    41→	return args.Error(0)
    42→}
    43→
    44→func (m *MockKBStorage) StorePatch(ctx context.Context, fingerprint string, patch []byte) error {
    45→	args := m.Called(ctx, fingerprint, patch)
    46→	return args.Error(0)
    47→}
    48→
    49→func (m *MockKBStorage) GetPatch(ctx context.Context, fingerprint string) ([]byte, error) {
    50→	args := m.Called(ctx, fingerprint)
    51→	if args.Get(0) == nil {
    52→		return nil, args.Error(1)
    53→	}
    54→	return args.Get(0).([]byte), args.Error(1)
    55→}
    56→
    57→func (m *MockKBStorage) WriteSnapshot(ctx context.Context, snapshot *SnapshotManifest) error {
    58→	args := m.Called(ctx, snapshot)
    59→	return args.Error(0)
    60→}
    61→
    62→func (m *MockKBStorage) ReadSnapshot(ctx context.Context) (*SnapshotManifest, error) {
    63→	args := m.Called(ctx)
    64→	if args.Get(0) == nil {
    65→		return nil, args.Error(1)
    66→	}
    67→	return args.Get(0).(*SnapshotManifest), args.Error(1)
    68→}
    69→
    70→func (m *MockKBStorage) Health(ctx context.Context) error {
    71→	args := m.Called(ctx)
    72→	return args.Error(0)
    73→}
    74→
    75→// Mock Lock Manager for testing
    76→type MockLockManager struct {
    77→	mock.Mock
    78→}
    79→
    80→func (m *MockLockManager) AcquireLock(ctx context.Context, key string, ttl time.Duration) (*Lock, error) {
    81→	args := m.Called(ctx, key, ttl)
    82→	if args.Get(0) == nil {
    83→		return nil, args.Error(1)
    84→	}
    85→	return args.Get(0).(*Lock), args.Error(1)
    86→}
    87→
    88→func (m *MockLockManager) ReleaseLock(ctx context.Context, lock *Lock) error {
    89→	args := m.Called(ctx, lock)
    90→	return args.Error(0)
    91→}
    92→
    93→func (m *MockLockManager) IsLocked(ctx context.Context, key string) (bool, error) {
    94→	args := m.Called(ctx, key)
    95→	return args.Bool(0), args.Error(1)
    96→}
    97→
    98→func (m *MockLockManager) TryWithLockRetry(ctx context.Context, key string, config *LockConfig, fn func() error) error {
    99→	args := m.Called(ctx, key, config, fn)
   100→	return args.Error(0)
   101→}

   103→// Test data creation helpers
   104→func createTestCases() []*CaseRecord {
   105→	baseTime := time.Date(2023, 12, 1, 10, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC)
   106→
   107→	return []*CaseRecord{
   108→		// Successful OpenRewrite recipe case
   109→		{
   110→			RunID:     "run-001",
   111→			Timestamp: baseTime,
   112→			Language:  "java",
   113→			Signature: "test-signature",
   114→			Attempt: &HealingAttempt{
   115→				Type:   "orw_recipe",
   116→				Recipe: "org.openrewrite.java.RemoveUnusedImports",
   117→			},
   118→			Outcome: &HealingOutcome{
   119→				Success:     true,
   120→				BuildStatus: "passed",
   121→				Duration:    3000, // 3 seconds
   122→				CompletedAt: baseTime.Add(3 * time.Second),
   123→			},
   124→		},
   125→		// Another successful case with same recipe
   126→		{
   127→			RunID:     "run-002",
   128→			Timestamp: baseTime.Add(1 * time.Hour),
   129→			Language:  "java",
   130→			Signature: "test-signature",
   131→			Attempt: &HealingAttempt{
   132→				Type:   "orw_recipe",
   133→				Recipe: "org.openrewrite.java.RemoveUnusedImports",
   134→			},
   135→			Outcome: &HealingOutcome{
   136→				Success:     true,
   137→				BuildStatus: "passed",
   138→				Duration:    2500,
   139→				CompletedAt: baseTime.Add(1*time.Hour + 2500*time.Millisecond),
   140→			},
   141→		},
   142→		// Failed case with same recipe
   143→		{
   144→			RunID:     "run-003",
   145→			Timestamp: baseTime.Add(2 * time.Hour),
   146→			Language:  "java",
   147→			Signature: "test-signature",
   148→			Attempt: &HealingAttempt{
   149→				Type:   "orw_recipe",
   150→				Recipe: "org.openrewrite.java.RemoveUnusedImports",
   151→			},
   152→			Outcome: &HealingOutcome{
   153→				Success:     false,
   154→				BuildStatus: "failed",
   155→				Duration:    1000,
   156→				CompletedAt: baseTime.Add(2*time.Hour + 1000*time.Millisecond),
   157→			},
   158→		},
   159→		// Successful patch case
   160→		{
   161→			RunID:     "run-004",
   162→			Timestamp: baseTime.Add(3 * time.Hour),
   163→			Language:  "java",
   164→			Signature: "test-signature",
   165→			Attempt: &HealingAttempt{
   166→				Type:             "llm_patch",
   167→				PatchFingerprint: "abc123def456789",
   168→			},
   169→			Outcome: &HealingOutcome{
   170→				Success:     true,
   171→				BuildStatus: "passed",
   172→				Duration:    4000,
   173→				CompletedAt: baseTime.Add(3*time.Hour + 4000*time.Millisecond),
   174→			},
   175→		},
   176→		// Another successful patch case (different fingerprint)
   177→		{
   178→			RunID:     "run-005",
   179→			Timestamp: baseTime.Add(4 * time.Hour),
   180→			Language:  "java",
   181→			Signature: "test-signature",
   182→			Attempt: &HealingAttempt{
   183→				Type:             "llm_patch",
   184→				PatchFingerprint: "xyz789abc123def",
   185→			},
   186→			Outcome: &HealingOutcome{
   187→				Success:     true,
   188→				BuildStatus: "passed",
   189→				Duration:    3500,
   190→				CompletedAt: baseTime.Add(4*time.Hour + 3500*time.Millisecond),
   191→			},
   192→		},
   193→		// Case with insufficient data (should be skipped)
   194→		{
   195→			RunID:     "run-006",
   196→			Timestamp: baseTime.Add(5 * time.Hour),
   197→			Language:  "java",
   198→			Signature: "test-signature",
   199→			Attempt: &HealingAttempt{
   200→				Type: "orw_recipe",
   201→				// Missing recipe field
   202→			},
   203→			Outcome: &HealingOutcome{
   204→				Success:     false,
   205→				BuildStatus: "failed",
   206→				Duration:    500,
   207→				CompletedAt: baseTime.Add(5*time.Hour + 500*time.Millisecond),
   208→			},
   209→		},
   210→	}
   211→}
   212→
   213→func TestSummaryComputer_AnalyzeCases(t *testing.T) {
   214→	mockStorage := new(MockKBStorage)
   215→	mockLockMgr := new(MockLockManager)
   216→	config := DefaultSummaryConfig()
   217→	computer := NewSummaryComputer(mockStorage, mockLockMgr, config)
   218→
   219→	cases := createTestCases()
   220→	candidates := computer.analyzeCases(cases)
   221→
   222→	// Should have 3 candidates: 1 recipe + 2 patches
   223→	assert.Len(t, candidates, 3)
   224→
   225→	// Check recipe candidate
   226→	recipeCand := candidates["recipe:org.openrewrite.java.RemoveUnusedImports"]
   227→	assert.NotNil(t, recipeCand)
   228→	assert.Equal(t, "orw_recipe", recipeCand.Kind)
   229→	assert.Equal(t, "org.openrewrite.java.RemoveUnusedImports", recipeCand.Ref)
   230→	assert.Equal(t, 2, recipeCand.Wins)
   231→	assert.Equal(t, 1, recipeCand.Failures)
   232→	assert.Equal(t, 3, recipeCand.TotalCases)
   233→	assert.InDelta(t, 0.667, recipeCand.SuccessRate, 0.01)
   234→
   235→	// Check first patch candidate
   236→	patch1Cand := candidates["patch:abc123def456789"]
   237→	assert.NotNil(t, patch1Cand)
   238→	assert.Equal(t, "patch_fingerprint", patch1Cand.Kind)
   239→	assert.Equal(t, "abc123def456789", patch1Cand.Ref)
   240→	assert.Equal(t, 1, patch1Cand.Wins)
   241→	assert.Equal(t, 0, patch1Cand.Failures)
   242→	assert.Equal(t, 1, patch1Cand.TotalCases)
   243→	assert.Equal(t, 1.0, patch1Cand.SuccessRate)
   244→
   245→	// Check second patch candidate
   246→	patch2Cand := candidates["patch:xyz789abc123def"]
   247→	assert.NotNil(t, patch2Cand)
   248→	assert.Equal(t, 1, patch2Cand.Wins)
   249→	assert.Equal(t, 1.0, patch2Cand.SuccessRate)
   250→}
   251→
   252→func TestSummaryComputer_ScoreCandidates(t *testing.T) {
   253→	mockStorage := new(MockKBStorage)
   254→	mockLockMgr := new(MockLockManager)
   255→	config := DefaultSummaryConfig()
   256→	config.MinCasesForPromotion = 1 // Lower threshold for testing
   257→	config.MinSuccessRate = 0.5
   258→	computer := NewSummaryComputer(mockStorage, mockLockMgr, config)
   259→
   260→	// Create test candidates
   261→	candidates := map[string]*FixCandidate{
   262→		"recipe:test1": {
   263→			Kind:          "orw_recipe",
   264→			Ref:           "test.recipe1",
   265→			Wins:          8,
   266→			Failures:      2,
   267→			TotalCases:    10,
   268→			SuccessRate:   0.8,
   269→			LastSuccessAt: time.Now().Add(-1 * time.Hour), // Recent
   270→		},
   271→		"recipe:test2": {
   272→			Kind:          "orw_recipe",
   273→			Ref:           "test.recipe2",
   274→			Wins:          3,
   275→			Failures:      2,
   276→			TotalCases:    5,
   277→			SuccessRate:   0.6,
   278→			LastSuccessAt: time.Now().Add(-30 * 24 * time.Hour), // Old
   279→		},
   280→		"patch:abc123": {
   281→			Kind:          "patch_fingerprint",
   282→			Ref:           "abc123",
   283→			Wins:          2,
   284→			Failures:      0,
   285→			TotalCases:    2,
   286→			SuccessRate:   1.0,
   287→			LastSuccessAt: time.Now().Add(-2 * time.Hour), // Fairly recent
   288→		},
   289→		"recipe:lowsuccess": {
   290→			Kind:        "orw_recipe",
   291→			Ref:         "test.lowsuccess",
   292→			Wins:        1,
   293→			Failures:    4,
   294→			TotalCases:  5,
   295→			SuccessRate: 0.2, // Below minimum threshold
   296→		},
   297→	}
   298→
   299→	scored := computer.scoreCandidates(candidates)
   300→
   301→	// Should filter out low success rate candidate
   302→	assert.Len(t, scored, 3)
   303→
   304→	// Should be sorted by score (highest first)
   305→	assert.True(t, scored[0].Score >= scored[1].Score)
   306→	assert.True(t, scored[1].Score >= scored[2].Score)
   307→
   308→	// Recipe with high wins and recent success should score well
   309→	found := false
   310→	for _, candidate := range scored {
   311→		if candidate.Ref == "test.recipe1" {
   312→			found = true
   313→			assert.True(t, candidate.Score > 0.5, "High-performing recent fix should have good score")
   314→		}
   315→	}
   316→	assert.True(t, found, "High-performing candidate should be included")
   317→}
   318→
   319→func TestSummaryComputer_ComputeStats(t *testing.T) {
   320→	mockStorage := new(MockKBStorage)
   321→	mockLockMgr := new(MockLockManager)
   322→	config := DefaultSummaryConfig()
   323→	computer := NewSummaryComputer(mockStorage, mockLockMgr, config)
   324→
   325→	cases := createTestCases()
   326→	stats := computer.computeStats(cases)
   327→
   328→	assert.Equal(t, 6, stats.TotalCases)
   329→	assert.Equal(t, 4, stats.SuccessCount)
   330→	assert.Equal(t, 2, stats.FailureCount)
   331→	assert.InDelta(t, 0.667, stats.SuccessRate, 0.01)
   332→
   333→	// Average duration should be calculated from valid durations
   334→	expectedAvg := (3000 + 2500 + 1000 + 4000 + 3500 + 500) / 6
   335→	assert.Equal(t, int64(expectedAvg), stats.AvgDuration)
   336→	assert.WithinDuration(t, time.Now(), stats.LastUpdated, 1*time.Second)
   337→}
   338→
   339→func TestSummaryComputer_ComputeAndUpdateSummary(t *testing.T) {
   340→	mockStorage := new(MockKBStorage)
   341→	mockLockMgr := new(MockLockManager)
   342→	config := DefaultSummaryConfig()
   343→	config.MinCasesForPromotion = 1 // Lower threshold for testing
   344→	config.MaxPromotedFixes = 2     // Limit for testing
   345→	computer := NewSummaryComputer(mockStorage, mockLockMgr, config)
   346→
   347→	ctx := context.Background()
   348→	lang := "java"
   349→	signature := "test-signature"
   350→	lockKey := BuildSignatureLockKey(lang, signature)
   351→
   352→	cases := createTestCases()
   353→
   354→	// Mock lock acquisition
   355→	testLock := &Lock{Key: lockKey, SessionID: "test-session"}
   356→	mockLockMgr.On("TryWithLockRetry", ctx, lockKey, mock.AnythingOfType("*transflow.LockConfig"), mock.AnythingOfType("func() error")).
   357→		Return(nil).
   358→		Run(func(args mock.Arguments) {
   359→			// Execute the function under lock
   360→			fn := args.Get(3).(func() error)
   361→			fn()
   362→		})
   363→
   364→	// Mock storage operations
   365→	mockStorage.On("ReadCases", ctx, lang, signature).Return(cases, nil)
   366→	mockStorage.On("WriteSummary", ctx, lang, signature, mock.AnythingOfType("*transflow.SummaryRecord")).Return(nil)
   367→
   368→	err := computer.ComputeAndUpdateSummary(ctx, lang, signature)
   369→
   370→	assert.NoError(t, err)
   371→	mockStorage.AssertExpectations(t)
   372→	mockLockMgr.AssertExpectations(t)
   373→}
   374→
   375→func TestSummaryComputer_GetRecommendedFixes(t *testing.T) {
   376→	mockStorage := new(MockKBStorage)
   377→	mockLockMgr := new(MockLockManager)
   378→	computer := NewSummaryComputer(mockStorage, mockLockMgr, DefaultSummaryConfig())
   379→
   380→	ctx := context.Background()
   381→	lang := "java"
   382→	signature := "test-signature"
   383→
   384→	// Mock summary with promoted fixes
   385→	summary := &SummaryRecord{
   386→		Language:  lang,
   387→		Signature: signature,
   388→		Promoted: []PromotedFix{
   389→			{
   390→				Kind:          "orw_recipe",
   391→				Ref:           "org.openrewrite.java.RemoveUnusedImports",
   392→				Score:         0.9,
   393→				Wins:          10,
   394→				Failures:      1,
   395→				LastSuccessAt: time.Now(),
   396→			},
   397→			{
   398→				Kind:          "patch_fingerprint",
   399→				Ref:           "abc123def456",
   400→				Score:         0.8,
   401→				Wins:          5,
   402→				Failures:      1,
   403→				LastSuccessAt: time.Now().Add(-1 * time.Hour),
   404→			},
   405→			{
   406→				Kind:          "orw_recipe",
   407→				Ref:           "org.openrewrite.java.cleanup.SimplifyBooleanExpression",
   408→				Score:         0.7,
   409→				Wins:          3,
   410→				Failures:      0,
   411→				LastSuccessAt: time.Now().Add(-2 * time.Hour),
   412→			},
   413→		},
   414→	}
   415→
   416→	mockStorage.On("ReadSummary", ctx, lang, signature).Return(summary, nil)
   417→
   418→	// Test getting all fixes
   419→	fixes, err := computer.GetRecommendedFixes(ctx, lang, signature, 0)
   420→	assert.NoError(t, err)
   421→	assert.Len(t, fixes, 3)
   422→
   423→	// Test limiting results
   424→	fixes, err = computer.GetRecommendedFixes(ctx, lang, signature, 2)
   425→	assert.NoError(t, err)
   426→	assert.Len(t, fixes, 2)
   427→
   428→	// Should return highest scoring fixes first
   429→	assert.Equal(t, 0.9, fixes[0].Score)
   430→	assert.Equal(t, 0.8, fixes[1].Score)
   431→
   432→	mockStorage.AssertExpectations(t)
   433→}

   435→func TestSummaryComputer_UpdateSummaryAfterCase(t *testing.T) {
   436→	mockStorage := new(MockKBStorage)
   437→	mockLockMgr := new(MockLockManager)
   438→	computer := NewSummaryComputer(mockStorage, mockLockMgr, DefaultSummaryConfig())
   439→
   440→	ctx := context.Background()
   441→	lang := "java"
   442→	signature := "test-signature"
   443→	lockKey := BuildSignatureLockKey(lang, signature)
   444→
   445→	cases := []*CaseRecord{createTestCases()[0]} // Just one case
   446→
   447→	// Mock successful lock and summary update
   448→	mockLockMgr.On("TryWithLockRetry", ctx, lockKey, mock.AnythingOfType("*transflow.LockConfig"), mock.AnythingOfType("func() error")).
   449→		Return(nil).
   450→		Run(func(args mock.Arguments) {
   451→			fn := args.Get(3).(func() error)
   452→			fn()
   453→		})
   454→
   455→	mockStorage.On("ReadCases", ctx, lang, signature).Return(cases, nil)
   456→	mockStorage.On("WriteSummary", ctx, lang, signature, mock.AnythingOfType("*transflow.SummaryRecord")).Return(nil)
   457→
   458→	err := computer.UpdateSummaryAfterCase(ctx, lang, signature)
   459→
   460→	assert.NoError(t, err)
   461→	mockStorage.AssertExpectations(t)
   462→	mockLockMgr.AssertExpectations(t)
   463→}
   464→
   465→func TestSummaryComputer_UpdateSummaryAfterCase_LockFailure(t *testing.T) {
   466→	mockStorage := new(MockKBStorage)
   467→	mockLockMgr := new(MockLockManager)
   468→	computer := NewSummaryComputer(mockStorage, mockLockMgr, DefaultSummaryConfig())
   469→
   470→	ctx := context.Background()
   471→	lang := "java"
   472→	signature := "test-signature"
   473→	lockKey := BuildSignatureLockKey(lang, signature)
   474→
   475→	// Mock lock acquisition failure (should not fail the operation)
   476→	mockLockMgr.On("TryWithLockRetry", ctx, lockKey, mock.AnythingOfType("*transflow.LockConfig"), mock.AnythingOfType("func() error")).
   477→		Return(assert.AnError)
   478→
   479→	// Should succeed even if lock fails (non-blocking)
   480→	err := computer.UpdateSummaryAfterCase(ctx, lang, signature)
   481→
   482→	assert.Error(t, err) // Actually, this should return the error
   483→	mockLockMgr.AssertExpectations(t)
   484→}

   486→func TestDefaultSummaryConfig(t *testing.T) {
   487→	config := DefaultSummaryConfig()
   488→
   489→	assert.Equal(t, 3, config.MinCasesForPromotion)
   490→	assert.Equal(t, 0.6, config.MinSuccessRate)
   491→	assert.Equal(t, 10, config.MaxPromotedFixes)
   492→	assert.Equal(t, 0.3, config.RecencyWeight)
   493→	assert.Equal(t, 0.4, config.FrequencyWeight)
   494→	assert.Equal(t, 0.3, config.SuccessRateWeight)
   495→	assert.Equal(t, 0.5, config.MinScore)
   496→	assert.Equal(t, 90, config.PromotionLookbackDays)
   497→
   498→	// Weights should sum to 1.0
   499→	totalWeight := config.RecencyWeight + config.FrequencyWeight + config.SuccessRateWeight
   500→	assert.InDelta(t, 1.0, totalWeight, 0.001)
   501→}
   502→
   503→func TestPromoteTopCandidates(t *testing.T) {
   504→	mockStorage := new(MockKBStorage)
   505→	mockLockMgr := new(MockLockManager)
   506→	config := DefaultSummaryConfig()
   507→	config.MaxPromotedFixes = 2 // Limit for testing
   508→	computer := NewSummaryComputer(mockStorage, mockLockMgr, config)
   509→
   510→	candidates := []*FixCandidate{
   511→		{
   512→			Kind:          "orw_recipe",
   513→			Ref:           "best.recipe",
   514→			Score:         0.9,
   515→			Wins:          10,
   516→			Failures:      1,
   517→			LastSuccessAt: time.Now(),
   518→			FirstSeenAt:   time.Now().Add(-24 * time.Hour),
   519→		},
   520→		{
   521→			Kind:          "patch_fingerprint",
   522→			Ref:           "good.patch",
   523→			Score:         0.8,
   524→			Wins:          5,
   525→			Failures:      0,
   526→			LastSuccessAt: time.Now().Add(-1 * time.Hour),
   527→			FirstSeenAt:   time.Now().Add(-12 * time.Hour),
   528→		},
   529→		{
   530→			Kind:          "orw_recipe",
   531→			Ref:           "ok.recipe",
   532→			Score:         0.6,
   533→			Wins:          3,
   534→			Failures:      1,
   535→			LastSuccessAt: time.Now().Add(-2 * time.Hour),
   536→			FirstSeenAt:   time.Now().Add(-6 * time.Hour),
   537→		},
   538→	}
   539→
   540→	promoted := computer.promoteTopCandidates(candidates)
   541→
   542→	// Should only promote top 2 due to MaxPromotedFixes limit
   543→	assert.Len(t, promoted, 2)
   544→	assert.Equal(t, "best.recipe", promoted[0].Ref)
   545→	assert.Equal(t, "good.patch", promoted[1].Ref)
   546→	assert.Equal(t, 0.9, promoted[0].Score)
   547→	assert.Equal(t, 0.8, promoted[1].Score)
   548→}
   549→
   550→// Benchmark tests
   551→func BenchmarkAnalyzeCases(b *testing.B) {
   552→	mockStorage := new(MockKBStorage)
   553→	mockLockMgr := new(MockLockManager)
   554→	computer := NewSummaryComputer(mockStorage, mockLockMgr, DefaultSummaryConfig())
   555→
   556→	cases := createTestCases()
   557→
   558→	b.ResetTimer()
   559→	for i := 0; i < b.N; i++ {

   561→	}
   562→}

   564→func BenchmarkScoreCandidates(b *testing.B) {
   565→	mockStorage := new(MockKBStorage)
   566→	mockLockMgr := new(MockLockManager)
   567→	computer := NewSummaryComputer(mockStorage, mockLockMgr, DefaultSummaryConfig())

   570→	candidates := make(map[string]*FixCandidate)

   572→		key := fmt.Sprintf("recipe:%d", i)
   573→		candidates[key] = &FixCandidate{
   574→			Kind:          "orw_recipe",
   575→			Ref:           fmt.Sprintf("recipe.%d", i),
   576→			Wins:          i + 1,
   577→			Failures:      i / 3,
   578→			TotalCases:    i + 1 + i/3,
   579→			SuccessRate:   float64(i+1) / float64(i+1+i/3),
   580→			LastSuccessAt: time.Now().Add(-time.Duration(i) * time.Hour),
   581→		}
   582→	}
   583→
   584→	b.ResetTimer()
   585→	for i := 0; i < b.N; i++ {
   586→		computer.scoreCandidates(candidates)
   587→	}
   588→}
